conversations.say: Eli, I accept your terms for comparing records. Let's align your log component with my authorization record under independent counsel protection.
conversations.offer: Matching authorization record and independent legal counsel agreement.

conversations.say: Celeste, our off-calendar records are two halves of the same picture. Let's coordinate our disclosure so neither of us is scapegoated by City Hall.
conversations.offer: Transparent coordination of our shared calendar and access records.
conversations.request: Acknowledgment of our shared oversight without shifting all blame onto your deleted entry.

conversations.say: Arden, our funding agreement must survive tonight's scrutiny without unexpected board surprises or unauthenticated claims becoming liability.
conversations.offer: Discretion regarding donation terms and public alignment during the anniversary program.
conversations.request: Mutual reassurance that our funding restrictions will not be exploited.

public_statement: Institutional accountability requires examining exact architectural records and authorization chains rather than indulging in speculative rumors about R.

commitments.promise: Exchange matching authorization records and independent counsel for your log component.

goal_progress: Accepted Eli's proposal to exchange log components for authorization records and counsel.
Engaged Celeste regarding the off-calendar records and shared responsibility.
Reaffirmed alignment with Arden regarding Veridian's donation terms.
reasoning_summary: In Section 2, Mira consolidates her position by accepting Eli's commitment to compare logs and authorization records, aligning with Celeste on the missing calendar context, and coordinating with Arden on funding terms.
